intro: Dev-call intelligence — the running capture of what our daily calls cover (in-product, carriers/vendors, data & servicing), the goals we're driving, the blockers in the way, and items that still need a task. Auto-summarized from the Gemini call recap.
note: Populated by CIH from the Gemini dev-call recap email after each call. (The site is static — the on-page button reloads the last CIH-published notes; CIH regenerates this from the newest Gemini email.)
goals: Nail down loan-reconciliation logic — paydowns applied directly to balances (no interest), with consistent case-details balance formulas.
Close the trust-date data gaps — run the trust-date script against the tranches DOMO shows as missing.
Finish Master Settlor infrastructure so GWT/DBR automation can begin.
Get Tranche Management fully working & verified; keep the confirmation-statement scraper reliable.
Clear the urgent National Life hotfixes.

blockers.ask: Verify remaining policies, then send notices (Mohit).

blockers.ask: Finish signer-role editing so DBR can start.

blockers.ask: Scraper under investigation (~2 weeks past anniversary).

needs_tasked.t: Case-details field + loan-paydown logic — document so balance formulas stay consistent
Bank reconciliation field on case details + update estimated loan-balance formulas
Run trust-date script — ID tranches needing it via DOMO missing-data compare, then execute
Send policy notices for Tranches 15 & 20 after verifying remaining policies
Reclassify client change requests from bugs → tasks (PM alignment)

latest_call.title: Dev Meeting
latest_call.lede: Technical workflow + logic call. Headlines: loan paydowns apply directly to balances (no interest); an automated trust-date script will fill missing data for tranches (driven off DOMO); and client change requests get reclassified as tasks, not bugs — with urgent items prioritized regardless of label.

items.text: Loan paydown logic defined: paydowns apply directly to loan balances with no interest calculation (aligns with the short-term reconciliation approach).
Add a case-details field capturing the paydown logic so estimated loan-balance formulas stay consistent (Shounak to task).
Manage the bank-reconciliation field on case details and update the related estimated loan-balance formulas (Shounak).
Automated script will handle missing trust-date information for the relevant tranches; identify which tranches need it by comparing missing data in DOMO, then run it.
Policy notices: send for Tranches 15 & 20 after verifying the remaining policies (Mohit); scraping difficulties + notice handling procedures finalized.
Client change requests will be categorized as tasks, not bugs (Olivia to reclassify) for proper PM alignment.
All urgent items require immediate prioritization regardless of labeling.
Loan paydowns → applied directly to balances, no interest calc.
Client updates → tasks, not bugs; urgent items prioritized.
Trust-date gaps → filled via automated script driven off DOMO missing-data.
